items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Boldog lazac:                An addictive game you'll want to play all the timeHappy Salmon is a fast and loud movement game that will have you laughing in less than two minutes. This game with simple rules is designed for the whole family and is great as a fun game for kids, school trips, camps, but also as a party game for adults. Players turn over their card, shout out what is on it and try to find the opponent whose card shows the same picture as quickly as possible. Once they find it, they must perform the action shown, then they can put the card down and continue playing. The object of the game is to get rid of all your cards first.  As a challenge, it is also possible to try the TICHOU variant of the Lucky Salmon game. One game of this game lasts only 90 seconds. items.raw_desc: Sampon BIODERMA Nodé A Sampon 400 ml:Hajmegerősítő sampon nőknek és férfiaknak. Dermokozmetikumként megfelel a legmagasabb minőségi követelményeknek. A Nodé termék elve = No detergence (nincs irritáció). Mint minden más Nodé sampon, a Nodé A is kíméletes tisztító alappal készül, amely tiszteletben tartja a haj és a fejbőr egyensúlyát.
